man000: Main character from Zero. Fought Zoids battles as a Blitz Team member with Liger Zero.
man001: Warrior of the Blitz Team. Cute face but she fights like a bull. A self-centered trouble maker.
man002: Freelance Zoid warrior. Seems stingy but his heart is pure and gentle. Works for the Blitz Team.
man003: A born champ. Used his money to get the best Zoids. Leader of the Champ Team. Desperately in love with Leena.
man004: Operates Berserk Fuhrer or Ultimate X that the Backdraft Group revived. Genius Zoid warrior.
man005: A wandering gambler in search of prize money. Operates Lightning Saix. A contract warrior for teams and has fought against Bit.
man006: A former Blitz Team warrior. Encounters Red Blade Liger during his journey. Later teams up with Naomi. Older brother of Leena.
man007: AKA Red Comet. A beautiful female warrior and master shooter. A loner and a winner of one-on-one battles.
man008: Harry's older sister. Extremely rich and collecting Zoids is her hobby. Love at first site for Bit's Liger Zero, which she uses in zoid battles.
man009: Older Tasker sister. Operates Lightning Saix. Teams up with Jack for Lightning Team.
man010: Younger Tasker sister. Operates Lightning Saix. Teams up with Jack for Lightning Team.
man011: A leader of Tigers Team. Strong dialect. In a losing streak after defeat by Blitz Team.
man012: A Backdraft warrior. Retired once but returns to zoid battles with Alteil's order. An encounter with Bit was a factor for his return.
man013: A Backdraft warrior. She is good at air combats, fought against Bit and Jamie several times.
man014: Leads a secret group that butchers Backdraft Team. Receives attack orders from Alteil.
man015: A Zoid-loving boy and an ancient zoid girl. Goes on a journey with Fiona after his encounter with Fiona and Organoid Zeke at ancient ruins. Operates Shield Liger.
man016: Have become top-notch Zoid riders after their defeat against Death Saurer 2 years ago. Members of the Guardian Force, an organization founded by the Republic and Empire to ensure peace.
man017: Continued making a living by winning prizes even after his defeat against Death Saurer. Later he becomes an ally for the Guarding Force.
man018: A former republic captain and later a colonel. Encounters Van and learns about his miraculous ability. He's always on the frontline and deeply trusted by his subordinates. Son of the Republic's president.
man019: Lost his memory and wandered around after being defeated by Van. Memory returns and resumes fighting in battles with Hiltz's encouragement.
man020: An ancient Zoidian, who plots against the Guardian Force. Tries to destroy the world by bringing Death Saurer back to life.
man021: An ancient Zoidian with a blue organoid, Specular. Good at psychological attacks and often acts alone in battles. She is betrayed by Hiltz but starts fighting together with Raven, who saves her life.
man022: Imperial forces' major and later colonel. From a family of famous warriors and has been Commandant in numerous battles. Good or bad, he is often the chosen one.
man023: He is an Imperial force lieutenant and a Guardian Force member. Colonel Schubaltz's younger brother. Develops and uses his own AI, Beak. It was love at first sight for Fiona.
man024: Leader of the Desert Alcavaledo Gang. Later saves Van from a dangerous situation as Ala Barone.
man025: The only female member of the Desert Alcavaledo. Later saves Van from a dangerous situation as Ala Barone.
man026: Guylos Empire's General and later regent. He plots to kill Rudolph and become Emperor himself. Also plots to rule the world by reviving Death Saurer.
man027: He defended Ardacia Kingdom when attacked by the Imperial Forces for her Space-Time Transfer Systems. Operates the kingdom's zoid, Trinity Liger.
man028: One of the three Beast Warriors for Arcadia Kingdom. She is the governess and supervisor for Atley, a descendant of ancient Zoidians. Very serious and responsible but a bit nosy,too.
man029: One of the best four warriors for the Phantom Knights. He regards Atley as his big rival. Operates Geno Hydra that has three heads.
man030: One of the best four warriors for the Phantom Knights. Born in the Empire. She is always calm and intelligent.
man031: Republic's Blue Unicorn member. He is excitable and simple-minded but also very intuitive. Good at handling Zoids, being able to feel the intentions of the Zoids.
man032: She followed her old friend Zan, and joined the Republic's Forces. As a Blue Unicorn member, Tita is infatuated with Zan but too shy to let him know. She's a skilled marksman, but tends to get hit easily.
man033: Leader of Republic's Blue Unicorn. With his experience from the past battles, he lives to train new warriors.
man034: A member of Empire's Rottiger. Excellent warrior but had not been rightfully recognized by his superiors. He joined Rottiger when asked by his former subordinate, Claudia.
man035: A member of Empire's Rottiger and son of a wealthy man. He goes after the surviving members of Zenebas Empire. His rival is Zan.
man036: Leader of Empire's Rottiger. Comes from a family of elite officers and is prideful. Max used to be her boss, but now the situation is reversed.
man037: The one behind "Terra Geist", an organization that tries to bring Zenebas Empire back to power. He used to fight against Zan but later became MIA.
man038: Used to be an excellent warrior but forced to leave Zenebas Empire because of a plot against him. Later became a Terrageist member. Succeeded to obtain important secrets in the Republic.
man039: She is orphaned by the war but saved by Guard, receiving elite training from him to become a zoid pilot. Absolutely believes in Guard. She is defeated by Zan and ends up fighting against him repeatedly.
man040: Using the Death Saurer,he is defeated by Zan and later becomes MIA. Trying to bring Zenebas Empire back to power.
man041: A Guylos Empire's operator. She supports Blue Unicorn's members, giving them information and orders. Occasional bloopers make her boss mad.
man042: A Helic Republic's operator. Supports the Rottiger members, giving them information and orders. She is very trusted by others for her hard work.
man043: A male warrior of the Helic Republic. Good at close-range grappling combats.
man044: A female warrior of Helic Republic. Good at long-range shooting.
man045: A male warrior of Guylos Empire. Good at close-range grappling combats.
man046: A female warrior of Guylos Empire. Good at long-range shooting.
man057: Zoid-loving boy and an ancient Zoidian girl. After his encounter with Fiona and Organoid Zeke in the ruins, Van travels with them. Operates Shield Liger.
man059: Operates Saber Tiger and Geno Saurer, fighting against Van many times. A top-notch Zoid rider.
man060: After the battle of Death Saurer, she always ends up with Van and the Guardian Force. Recognized by Hermann and becomes an Ultra Saurer operator, taking it later for his own use.
man061: A capable one who gives strategic commands and also works as a mechanic for the Blitz Team. Usually nice and calm, but he becomes the Brave Wild Eagle when his Zoid flies faster than the sound of speed.
man062: A Tiger Team member. He admires the team leader Kirkland like his own brother. Gets repeatedly defeated in battles. His frequent dinner menu is Cup-O-Noodles.
man063: A new recruit to the Republic Forces. His admiration for Senior Pilot Zan made him join the Blue Unicorn team. But his first duty is to locate his missing team members.
man064: An Empire warrior who spends a lot of time with the Rottiger. He is a lone wolf and does not work well in a team environment. He seems to work well with Reiner, though.
man065: An official of Terra Geist, an organization that plots to revive Zenebas. She replaces Viper, the leader, and initiates attacks against the Republic and Empire Forces.
man066: After traveling as a Zoid mercenary, he finds himself in the time-space fusion and becomes a Zoid warrior. He is not aware of the secrets that shroud his birth.
man067: She and Zel are always together in the time-space fused world. Genius at handling Zoids but Terra Geist somehow tries to get her.
